TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ilham_Aliyev, title = Ilham_Aliyev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ilham_Aliyev} }

S.FORM: I 1961 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 24 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ilham Aliyev , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Azerbaijan anini i ci Ilham Aliyev, patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i i…ĺńßam a…ĺij…ôb~v , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u a*…ôrb~b~vaijan anini i ¶i i…ĺńßam a…ĺij…ôb~v, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1961 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 24 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ilham Aliyev , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Azerbaijan anini i ci Ilham Aliyev, patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
